scripts.deploy:moicen: mode=moicen vite build && tar czf dist.tar.gz dist && scp dist.tar.gz moicen:/tmp/ && ssh moicen 'sudo tar xzf /tmp/dist.tar.gz -C /usr/local/openresty/nginx/html/authcoreadmin/ && sudo chmod -R o+rx /usr/local/openresty/nginx/html/authcoreadmin/ && rm /tmp/dist.tar.gz' && rm dist.tar.gz
